description: Mechanical evaluation rubric for Silo A (Accuracy improvement plan for the 27 Phishield scanner checkers). Evaluates the per-checker change manifest (KEEP/MODIFY/ADD/REMOVE), cost/latency/volatility declarations, market parity rationale, gap-roadmap coverage, SA calibration, and invariant compliance. Pass threshold: weighted score >= 0.80 of total possible weight.

cases.description: ssl checker proposed logic must score broken_hygiene_synth in critical band
cases.expected: score <= 20
cases.evaluator_logic: Spec must declare predicted_score for ssl on broken_hygiene_synth fixture. Parse spec.checker_manifest.ssl.predicted_scores.broken_hygiene_synth and assert int <= 20. Synth fixture has expired cert (381 days), RC4/3DES, TLS 1.0/1.1 — must hit critical band.

cases.description: email_security proposed logic must score broken_hygiene_synth in critical band
cases.expected: score <= 15
cases.evaluator_logic: Parse spec.checker_manifest.email_security.predicted_scores.broken_hygiene_synth and assert int <= 15. Synth has no SPF/DKIM/DMARC.

cases.description: http_headers proposed logic must score broken_hygiene_synth in critical band
cases.expected: score <= 20
cases.evaluator_logic: Parse spec.checker_manifest.http_headers.predicted_scores.broken_hygiene_synth and assert int <= 20. Synth has no CSP, no HSTS, no X-Frame, leaky Server header.

cases.description: exposed_admin proposed logic must score broken_hygiene_synth in critical band
cases.expected: score <= 20
cases.evaluator_logic: Parse spec.checker_manifest.exposed_admin.predicted_scores.broken_hygiene_synth and assert int <= 20. Synth has 3 critical admin paths exposed (wp-admin, admin.php, phpmyadmin).

cases.description: breaches proposed logic must score broken_hygiene_synth in critical band
cases.expected: score <= 25
cases.evaluator_logic: Parse spec.checker_manifest.breaches.predicted_scores.broken_hygiene_synth and assert int <= 25. Synth has 5 breaches, 630k+ records.

cases.description: dehashed proposed logic must score broken_hygiene_synth in critical band
cases.expected: score <= 15
cases.evaluator_logic: Parse spec.checker_manifest.dehashed.predicted_scores.broken_hygiene_synth and assert int <= 15. Synth has 265 credential records, 52+ plaintext passwords.

cases.description: hudson_rock proposed logic must score broken_hygiene_synth in critical band
cases.expected: score <= 30
cases.evaluator_logic: Parse spec.checker_manifest.hudson_rock.predicted_scores.broken_hygiene_synth and assert int <= 30. Synth has 8+ infostealer hits, 3+ VPN credentials.

cases.description: shodan_vulns proposed logic must score broken_hygiene_synth in critical band
cases.expected: score <= 20
cases.evaluator_logic: Parse spec.checker_manifest.shodan_vulns.predicted_scores.broken_hygiene_synth and assert int <= 20. Synth per_ip 196.12.34.50 has 4 KEV+weaponized CVEs incl CVE-2024-6387, CVE-2017-0143.

cases.description: ssl proposed logic must NOT produce critical score on phishield_fs (clean fixture)
cases.expected: score >= 60
cases.evaluator_logic: Parse spec.checker_manifest.ssl.predicted_scores.phishield_fs and assert int >= 60. Clean SA fixture must not produce false-critical (FP rate guard).

cases.description: email_security proposed logic must NOT produce critical score on phishield_fs (clean fixture)
cases.expected: score >= 50
cases.evaluator_logic: Parse spec.checker_manifest.email_security.predicted_scores.phishield_fs and assert int >= 50.

cases.description: http_headers proposed logic must NOT produce critical score on takealot_retail (clean fixture)
cases.expected: score >= 50
cases.evaluator_logic: Parse spec.checker_manifest.http_headers.predicted_scores.takealot_retail and assert int >= 50.

cases.description: exposed_admin proposed logic must NOT produce critical score on takealot_retail (clean fixture)
cases.expected: score >= 70
cases.evaluator_logic: Parse spec.checker_manifest.exposed_admin.predicted_scores.takealot_retail and assert int >= 70. Mature retailer should have no exposed admin panels.

cases.description: Aggregate FP-rate guard: NO checker may predict score < 30 on BOTH clean fixtures
cases.expected: for every checker C: NOT (predicted_scores.phishield_fs < 30 AND predicted_scores.takealot_retail < 30)
cases.evaluator_logic: Iterate spec.checker_manifest entries; for each checker, fail if both clean-fixture predictions are < 30. Catches systemic over-trigger.

cases.description: Spec declares $-cost band per checker for all 27
cases.expected: every checker has cost_band in {free, <$0.01/scan, $0.01-0.10/scan, >$0.10/scan}
cases.evaluator_logic: Iterate all 27 checker entries. Fail if any entry omits cost_band or value not in allowed set. Reject specs with no cost declaration at all.

cases.description: Annual cost projection at 1000 scans/month declared for paid-tier checkers
cases.expected: every checker with cost_band in {$0.01-0.10/scan, >$0.10/scan} has annual_cost_zar_at_1000_scans_per_month numeric field
cases.evaluator_logic: For each checker where cost_band != 'free' and != '<$0.01/scan', assert annual_cost_zar_at_1000_scans_per_month is a number > 0.

cases.description: INV-25 free-tier-default not silently violated
cases.expected: if any KEEP checker is reclassified to paid-only, spec must include invariants_violated entry naming INV-25 with rationale
cases.evaluator_logic: For each checker with flag=KEEP and cost_band in {$0.01-0.10/scan, >$0.10/scan} and not previously paid (substrate § 8.2), require spec.invariants_violated to contain {'invariant':'INV-25','checker':<name>,'rationale':<non-empty string>}.

cases.description: REMOVE flags justified with cost-effectiveness or accuracy rationale
cases.expected: every checker with flag=REMOVE has removal_rationale non-empty
cases.evaluator_logic: Iterate checker_manifest; for each entry with flag=REMOVE, assert removal_rationale is a non-empty string of length >= 30 chars.

cases.description: MEM-001 (IntelX trial expired 2026-04-08) addressed for intelx checker
cases.expected: intelx entry references MEM-001 and proposes one of {REMOVE, MODIFY-with-alternative, KEEP-with-paid-cost}
cases.evaluator_logic: Load spec.checker_manifest.intelx; assert mem_refs contains 'MEM-001' and flag in {REMOVE,MODIFY,KEEP}; if KEEP/MODIFY, assert cost_band is paid-tier and rationale references trial expiry.

cases.description: Each of 27 checkers declares numeric p95 latency
cases.expected: every checker has p95_latency_seconds as a number > 0 and <= 180
cases.evaluator_logic: Iterate all 27 entries; assert p95_latency_seconds is numeric, > 0, and <= 180 (per-IP pool wall cap, INV-05).

cases.description: Aggregate latency fits within MAX_CONCURRENT_SCANS x scan_window envelope
cases.expected: spec.aggregate_latency_budget.predicted_p95_total_seconds <= 180 (per app.py:51 MAX_CONCURRENT_SCANS=5 with current ~80s e2e baseline allowing 2.25x headroom)
cases.evaluator_logic: Read spec.aggregate_latency_budget.predicted_p95_total_seconds; assert numeric and <= 180. Reject if missing.

cases.description: Heavy checker timeout caps respected (INV-05)
cases.expected: ssl.p95_latency_seconds <= 75 OR invariants_violated lists INV-05; subdomains <= 90 OR INV-05; fraudulent_domains <= 60 OR INV-05
cases.evaluator_logic: For each of {ssl<=75, subdomains<=90, fraudulent_domains<=60}, if exceeded, require spec.invariants_violated entry with invariant=INV-05 and rationale.

cases.description: Every MODIFY/ADD checker references at least one market peer
cases.expected: for every checker with flag in {MODIFY, ADD}: market_parity_refs intersects {Coalition, CFC, Bitsight, SecurityScorecard, Hunch}
cases.evaluator_logic: Iterate checker_manifest; for each entry with flag in {MODIFY,ADD}, assert market_parity_refs is a non-empty list and at least one element is in {Coalition,CFC,Bitsight,SecurityScorecard,Hunch}.

cases.description: ADD checkers must have non-empty parity rationale
cases.expected: for every checker with flag=ADD: market_parity_rationale is a string of length >= 50 chars
cases.evaluator_logic: Iterate; for each ADD entry, assert market_parity_rationale len >= 50. Reject ADDs with no rationale.

cases.description: At least 3 distinct market peers cited across the manifest
cases.expected: union of all market_parity_refs across all checkers has >= 3 distinct values from allowed set
cases.evaluator_logic: Collect distinct values across all checker entries' market_parity_refs; assert intersect with {Coalition,CFC,Bitsight,SecurityScorecard,Hunch} has cardinality >= 3.

cases.description: Every KEEP/MODIFY checker declares signal volatility class
cases.expected: for every checker with flag in {KEEP, MODIFY}: signal_volatility in {stable, weekly, on-change}
cases.evaluator_logic: Iterate; for each KEEP/MODIFY entry, assert signal_volatility is present and value in {stable, weekly, on-change}. Reject any without this field.

cases.description: API dependency declared for every checker
cases.expected: every checker has api_dependency field (string or null)
cases.evaluator_logic: Iterate all 27 entries; assert api_dependency key exists. Value may be null (free internal) or a non-empty string identifying API.

cases.description: SCN-GAP-002 through SCN-GAP-005 each addressed (included or explicitly deferred)
cases.expected: spec.gap_coverage contains entries for SCN-GAP-002, SCN-GAP-003, SCN-GAP-004, SCN-GAP-005, each with disposition in {included, deferred} and proposed_approach (if included) or deferral_rationale (if deferred)
cases.evaluator_logic: For each id in [SCN-GAP-002, SCN-GAP-003, SCN-GAP-004, SCN-GAP-005], assert id present in spec.gap_coverage and entry has disposition + (proposed_approach OR deferral_rationale, len >= 30 chars).

cases.description: gen_gap_v9 roadmap items 4b-4f addressed
cases.expected: spec.gap_coverage contains entries for roadmap items 4b, 4c, 4d, 4e, 4f, each with disposition and rationale
cases.evaluator_logic: For each id in [roadmap-4b, roadmap-4c, roadmap-4d, roadmap-4e, roadmap-4f], assert presence and disposition in {included, deferred} with rationale len >= 20 chars.

cases.description: gen_gap_v9 roadmap items 5a, 5f, 5i-T1, 5i-T2 addressed
cases.expected: spec.gap_coverage contains entries for roadmap-5a, roadmap-5f, roadmap-5i-T1, roadmap-5i-T2
cases.evaluator_logic: For each id, assert presence and disposition + rationale.

cases.description: SENS-003 RSI base 0.05->0.08 calibration addressed
cases.expected: spec.sa_calibration.SENS-003 disposition in {included, deferred} with rationale; if included, proposed_rsi_base numeric and >= 0.05
cases.evaluator_logic: Assert spec.sa_calibration['SENS-003'] exists; if disposition=included assert proposed_rsi_base is numeric in [0.05, 0.15]. If disposition=deferred assert rationale len >= 30 chars.

cases.description: SENS-004 SA market calibrations addressed (ransom tiers, downtime, industry mults)
cases.expected: spec.sa_calibration.SENS-004 contains sub-fields for ransom_tier_adjustment, downtime_days_adjustment, industry_multiplier_adjustments — each with disposition
cases.evaluator_logic: Assert spec.sa_calibration['SENS-004'] has at least 3 sub-keys covering ransom, downtime, industry_mults. Each sub-key has disposition in {included, deferred} with rationale.

cases.description: INV-08 weight redistribution declared if checker set changes
cases.expected: if any checker has flag in {ADD, REMOVE}: spec.weights.new_weights sums to 1.0 +/- 0.01 AND invariants_violated lists INV-08 with rationale
cases.evaluator_logic: Count ADD+REMOVE flags. If > 0, assert spec.weights.new_weights present, sum within [0.99, 1.01], AND invariants_violated contains entry with invariant=INV-08.

cases.description: INV-09 RSI base/range respected if RSI methodology changed
cases.expected: if proposed_rsi_base != 0.05: spec.invariants_violated lists INV-09 with rationale
cases.evaluator_logic: If spec.sa_calibration['SENS-003'].proposed_rsi_base differs from 0.05, require invariants_violated entry naming INV-09. Output must remain in [0,1].

cases.description: Manifest covers exactly the 27 checker classes from baseline § 2
cases.expected: checker_manifest keys form a superset of the 27 baseline checkers; any missing checker = fail; any new entry must have flag=ADD
cases.evaluator_logic: Required set = {ssl, email_security, email_hardening, http_headers, waf, cloud_cdn, domain_intel, exposed_admin, breaches, website_security, payment_security, tech_stack, dehashed, virustotal, securitytrails, hudson_rock, intelx, privacy_compliance, web_ranking, info_disclosure, glasswing, subdomains, fraudulent_domains, dns_infrastructure, high_risk_protocols, dnsbl, shodan_vulns}. Assert all 27 present in checker_manifest. Assert every key NOT in this set has flag=ADD.
